scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:web & wait
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
